steps.name: Given user logs in as "siteadmin" with password "admin_password"
Given user "play" "First video in playlist loop" from global search icon from "Videos" section
When user go to "transcript" section of video settings from video play page
And user upload transcript "english-in" "English.vtt" on video "First video in playlist loop"
Then "English.vtt" transcript uploaded sucessfully
